update.releaseNotes:
Version 3.5.0.0 Release Notes:
✨ New Features: - Added DBF Duplicate File Scanner and Remover • Scans all .dbf files and identifies duplicates based on content hash (SHA256) • Safely deletes duplicate files without creating backups • Shows detailed before/after report of duplicate deletion • Excludes .bak files from scanning - Added 12 new sales centers/plants to the system • CALBIGA SALES CENTER • PARANAS SALES CENTER • CATBALOGAN SALES CENTER • CALBAYOG SALES CENTER • SAN ISIDRO NS SALES CENTER • ALLEN SALES CENTER • MONDRAGON SALES CENTER • LAOANG SALES CENTER • LAS NAVAS SALES CENTER • ARTECHE SALES CENTER • BALANGIGA SALES CENTER • STA RITA SALES CENTER - Removed CCS extraction feature (temporarily - to be added back later)
🐛 Bug Fixes: - Fixed DBF duplicate file handling - Improved file scanning performance
🔧 Improvements: - Enhanced duplicate detection using SHA256 hashing - Better error handling for file operations - Improved UI responsiveness during file scans - More detailed reporting for duplicate removal operations
Please update to access the new DBF duplicate file removal feature and expanded sales center support.
